name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
1600 Daily Everything White House for 6/20/2017. |
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=38df1c8b62a6ecb4c2d3ad4fc2f31c401f477df4e7118b35dbeee6d5ece69e548ae1dd5de5f49b0d2970f9b3c33597ad31d07424ae1257c4

President Donald J. Trump is embracing big change, bold thinking, and outsider perspectives to transform government and make it work better, and at a far less cost. This new spirit of innovation will make life better for all Americans by modernizing critical IT systems, making government more transparent, and saving the taxpayers up to $1 trillion dollars over the next 10 years.

Today's Events

10:30 AM: Vice President Pence participates in a bilateral meeting with President Petro Poroshenko of Ukraine

11:00 AM: President Trump meets with National Security Advisor H.R. McMaster with a drop-in by Vice President Mike Pence and President Petro Poroshenko of Ukraine

11:45 AM: Vice President Pence delivers remarks at the National Association of Manufacturers (NAM) 2017 Manufacturing Summit

12:30 PM: President Trump has a Legislative Affairs lunch

12:45 PM: Vice President Pence participates in the Senate Republican Policy Lunch

2:00 PM: Vice President Pence participates in a series of meetings with lawmakers

7:00 PM: President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump have dinner with Vice President Pence and Mrs. Karen Pence

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: they're silencing women, everyone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello -- When you helped elect me last November, you helped New Hampshire send the first all-woman, all-Democratic delegation to Congress in our nation's history. I'm so very proud to be part of that.
Too often, women are shut down for speaking their minds, attacked for asking important questions, or dismissed for pushing for answers. Unfortunately, that's a pattern that also persists today in Washington.
This is one of the many reasons we absolutely have to hold on to our existing Democratic women Senators.
Women like Claire McCaskill who pressed Senate Republicans to make their health care plan public.
Women like Elizabeth Warren, who Republicans attempted to silence when she opposed Jeff Sessions' nomination by reading Coretta Scott King's letter.
The sad truth is that the current administration isn't just excluding women from conversations about a health care bill that will impact women's health care for decades to come, it's actively silencing us on issues across the spectrum.
[**Everyone, I 'm asking you personally to please donate $3 or more now to help re-elect two of the strongest women I know -- Senators Elizabeth Warren and Claire McCaskill. subject: I'm sounding the alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I'm appalled at how Republicans are working in secrecy, behind closed doors on their health care plan that will impact tens of millions of people. I know I'm not alone in this fight, and more than ever, the GOP needs to see it...
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fight-back-trumpcare?refcode=DPE-20170620-Murray-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
I'm furious, Team -- and you should be, too.

Right now, 13 Republican men are in a secret room, working on a secret bill that would rip coverage from tens of millions of people, and they are refusing to show it to any Democrats or the people who it would impact most.

And as soon as it's ready, they'll attempt to pass it in the dark of the night without hearings, debate, or any public input.

I wish I was making this up, but _no_ Senate Democrat can see what's in store for the health and financial security of families across this country. And families themselves are being kept in the dark too.

We can't even sense how long we have to stop it when Mitch McConnell can call a vote at any time. **So I 'm asking you to raise your voice today and fight back with everything we've got. **

[**Show Republican Senators we are fighting tooth and nail to save health care. Chip in $1 right now to stand with Democratic senators and protect quality, affordable health care for all.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fight-back-trumpcare?refcode=DPE-20170620-Murray-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

I asked my Republican colleagues point blank if we were going to see the GOP bill or if there were going to be hearings. **I was told "none planned."**

That's simply a cruel response to avoid justifying a plan that would raise premiums by as much as 850 percent for seniors, remove protections for people with pre-existing conditions, end Medicaid as we know it, and cut off access to Planned Parenthood's critical health care services -- all to give insurance companies and the very wealthy massive tax breaks.

The strength of our opposition now will determine if we can overcome these schemes and secrecy and defeat Trumpcare -- and while I'm doing everything in my power to hold the line against Trumpcare, I'm asking for your help, team.

**Chip in $1 right now to show Republicans you 're not backing down in this fight with Democrats:

name: Shannon Jackson, Our Revolution
subject: Call your senator and stop Trumpcare
body:
a bill that could force people to go without necessary health care
#
Friends,
Republicans in the Senate want to keep the American people in limbo by keeping their version of the American Health Care Act secret. Right now, Mitch McConnell and his Senate colleagues are putting together a bill that could force people to go without necessary health care in order to give huge tax breaks to the insurance industry.
We deserve to know how much the Republican plan will increase our premiums, deductibles, and copayments, how many people will lose coverage, and what impact the $800 billion cut to Medicaid will have on those suffering from the ongoing opioid epidemic. We demand health care for those who lack coverage at this very moment, and the ones who might lose coverage due to pre-existing conditions.
The House passed their version of the so-called American Health Care Act without a score from the CBO, but we now know that 23 million people will lose coverage if it passes. That's not to mention the millions more who will be priced out of affording prescriptions and other vital components of health care, all so the very wealthiest can receive yet another tax cut. **[Call your senator today and tell them to stop the American Health Care Act. We need to start over with a plan that covers everybody.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d8a/43f17890/cf5d835b/6203612d/831559111/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170620-full")**
We are fighting for universal coverage under a Medicare for All, single payer system that cuts the insurance industry out of the equation. In a single payer system, the monthly premium is the only time the patient is charged. Medical bankruptcy due to terminal illness would be a thing of the past, and the price gouging of the pharmaceutical industry would be stopped. It's time for the United States to join the UK, Canada, France, and every other major country--all of which guarantee healthcare as a right to all of their people.
Republicans in the Senate are beholden to the very industries that they are attempting to regulate. As a result, our health care access is in the hands of corporations who are looking to cash out every time a patient needs prenatal care, chemotherapy, and any other treatment.
Republicans want to take away health care from millions of people by passing the American Health Care Act. **[Please call your senator and tell them to stop their secret health care repeal and start over with a plan guaranteed to cover everybody.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d8a/43f17890/cf5d835b/6203612d/831559111/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170620-full")**
We are getting closer than ever to achieving real universal coverage. A majority of the American people support universal coverage. While that opinion may not be reflected in the Senate, remember that they answer to us. **[Please call them today.](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d8a/43f17890/cf5d835b/6203612d/831559111/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170620-full")**
In solidarity,
Shannon Jackson
Executive Director
Our Revolution
**[CALL MY SENATOR»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d8a/43f17890/cf5d835b/6203612d/831559111/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/content/stop-ahca/?source=em170620-full")**

It's time for the United States to join the UK, Canada, France, and every other major country--all of which guarantee healthcare as a right to all of their people. Republicans in the Senate are beholden to the very industries that they are attempting to regulate. As a result, our health care access is in the hands of corporations who are looking to cash out every time a patient needs prenatal care, chemotherapy, and any other treatment. Republicans want to take away health care from millions of people by passing the American Health Care Act. "" We are getting closer than ever to achieving real universal coverage. A majority of the American people support universal coverage. While that opinion may not be reflected in the Senate, remember that they answer to us. "" In solidarity, Shannon Jackson Executive Director Our Revolution "" PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION 603 2ND ST, NE WASHINGTON, DC, 20002 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | **_[Joe Donnelly is a health care hypocrite.](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=e6582ab163&e=1acd9bb3d6)_**

During a speech on the floor of the U.S. Senate yesterday afternoon, Senator Joe Donnelly accelerated his ‘feisty’ campaign rhetoric by insinuating that President Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans have purposely promoted “chaos” in the health care marketplace for political gain.

Think about that for just a second. The same guy who rubber-stamped the passage of Obamacare, the health care bill that has killed jobs, spiked premiums and brought real chaos and uncertainty to the marketplace, is trying to blame Republicans for the mess he created!

We don’t need an obstructionist hypocrite pretending to represent us in the U.S. Senate. We need someone who will respect the will of Hoosier voters and work with President Trump to improve our great nation.

**_[Will you help us build our Defeat Donnelly Fund with an immediate contribution of $10, $25 or $50 today?](http://indgop.us11.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=964b471ff5&e=1acd9bb3d6) _**

Joe Donnelly wasn’t concerned when half of the insurers offering health coverage through the exchange fled Indiana late last year, but with his re-election on the horizon he thought it was time to shed his moderate façade in order to fully morph into a Resistance-embracing D.C. Democrat live on the floor of the U.S. Senate.

**_[We deserve so much better than Joe Donnelly.](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=317325ba3c&e=1acd9bb3d6) _**

He can’t simply wash his hands of Obamacare by saying he wants to fix that disastrous bill. He bought it word for word and line for line when he succumbed to Nancy Pelosi’s wishes and voted for the bill despite the overwhelming disapproval of Hoosiers.

Now it’s time that we send a message that Joe Donnelly can’t ignore by defeating him in 2018 and sending a Republican to fight for us in the U.S. Senate.

Sincerely,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana Republican Party

Friends,

Republican legislative leaders believe that those making millions of dollars should get a tax giveaway 85 times bigger than middle class families.

**Eighty-five times.**

That's what we found in the budget they released last night. And that's not all.

Their teacher pay plan doesn't do enough. There's almost no state money allocated to fight the opioid crisis. There is minimal funding for NC-Ready economic development sites which would bring good new jobs to rural communities.

**[We have to do better. With the right priorities, we can build a North Carolina that works for everyone. This budget doesn't do that. Add your name here if you're with me.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202caa/2fde7c66/42a7dba7/15697c38/1724870630/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/we-can-do-so-much-more?utm_campaign=em17_170620_budget_adv_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170620_budget_adv_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

I've always said you can tell someone's priorities by looking at their budget. This budget makes it clear: Republican leaders are more interested in tax giveaways for the very wealthy than making critical investments in our schools, economy, or middle-class families.

This is a pivotal moment for our state. As our economy continues to recover, we must invest in our people to create good jobs and opportunity for the middle class. Unfortunately, the Republican budget falls short.

**[This budget does not get the job done for North Carolina families -- it's the most fiscally irresponsible budget that I can remember. Add your name if you agree.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202caa/2fde7c66/42a7dba7/15697c38/1724870630/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/we-can-do-so-much-more?utm_campaign=em17_170620_budget_adv_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em17_170620_budget_adv_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

Roy

**Democrats held the Senate floor to fight back against the GOP's secret health care bill. We need more folks like them in office. Pitch in $3 or more today:

When we elect more Democrats to Congress, hardworking American families get fighters. They get senators, members of Congress, governors, and legislators who will stand up and do whatever it takes to make life better for us all.

But with Republicans in power, the consequences are disastrous. Cowering behind closed doors to craft a repeal bill that will hurt millions of Americans is just the tip of the iceberg for the GOP agenda.

We need more Democrats in office who will fight for all Americans, from city council to the White House. And Democrats who are out on the front lines need to know we've got their backs.

Pitch in $3 or whatever you can now to stand with Senate Democrats who are fighting back against the GOP's health care repeal and to help elect more Democrats all over the country.

subject: Senate Democrats held the floor

body:
Senate Democrats are fighting Trumpcare with all they've got, holding the floor and preventing the Senate from conducting business as usual.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e588/2b07114c/22a179ae/7310f798/3857965341/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-trumpcare-fast-track?source=PT-20170620-UrgentAlert_DS-ProsHV")**
Team,

Last night, Senate Democrats held the floor to protest Trumpcare. As Senator Schumer said yesterday:

_**" If Republicans won't relent and debate their health care bill in the open for the American people to see, then they shouldn't expect business as usual in the Senate."**_
Republicans have made clear why they are drafting this bill in secret -- they're ashamed of it, and they should be. The reality is their plan would give the wealthiest a tax break while making middle class families pay more for less health care coverage.

[**Join Senate Democrats in calling out the Republicans ' efforts to secretly rush through this disaster of a bill. Add your name right now to show the American people are watching.**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e588/2b07114c/22a179ae/7310f798/3857965341/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-trumpcare-fast-track?source=PT-20170620-UrgentAlert_DS-ProsHV")

Mitch McConnell is determined to hold a vote on repeal by the end of next week -- and he's taken every step to keep the bill behind closed doors and ram it through without any public debate that could endanger its passage.

Senate Democrats are fighting back with all they've got, staying up all night to hold the floor and prevent the Senate from conducting business as usual to call public attention to the GOP's awful bill.

But Senate Democrats can't win this fight alone. They're counting on us to help hold Republicans accountable and stop this reckless bill.

**Senate Democrats need us to show we 're watching the Republicans try to force through Obamacare repeal -- and that we won't let them get away with it. Add your name right now to oppose the GOP'S Obamacare repeal bill:**

[**http://dscc.org/hold-the-floor-with-democrats**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e588/2b07114c/22a179ae/7310f798/3857965341/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/stop-trumpcare-fast-track?source=PT-20170620-UrgentAlert_DS-ProsHV")

Senate Democrats won't stop resisting and working to stop Republicans from bending the rules to pass this disastrous bill. This critical time before a vote is when your support counts the most.

Thanks for standing with Democrats,

Team DSCC

**A quick note on donations, team:**

When we say that we're counting on grassroots donors to protect Senate Democrats, we're not kidding. In fact, a full 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We don't have the Koch brothers in our corner -- but we have you. And every gift you give the DSCC is a gift we use to propel our Senate candidates to victory.

Please consider contributing today. Many of our Senate champions are up for reelection in 2018 and we know that the Koch brothers and special interests will make it incredibly tough to ensure they can keep fighting for us in the Senate without your support.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: Keeping us in the dark (AHCA)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2613/7377f838/36733858/51fb60b8/2541513221/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

For as long as I've been a public servant, I've known that honesty and transparency are at the core of how we serve the people we are elected to represent. **That 's why what Republicans are doing now -- writing a health care bill in secret, with no chance for the public or even their Senate colleagues to weigh in -- is so shameful.**

Yesterday, I stood on the Senate floor and urged the GOP and the Trump Administration to stop purposefully undermining our health care system, and now I need you to join me. **[Peter, add your name to join me in demanding that Republicans stop negotiating in secret and write their health care bill in the light of day.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2613/7377f838/36733858/51fb60bb/2541513221/VEsE/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-stand-with-joe-and-demand-an-open-hearing-on-health-care")**

Indiana wants Washington to improve our health care, but congressional Republicans aren't trying to repair the system -- they're trying to burn it down. Their plan would take insurance away from over 310,000 Hoosiers, raise our premiums by thousands of dollars and make it harder and more expensive for Hoosiers with preexisting conditions to get coverage. **No wonder they want to keep it a secret.**

**A functional, accessible health care system is vital to Hoosiers ' economic security, and should never be sacrificed to fund tax cuts for the rich.** I'm fighting to defeat the GOP's cruel health care bill, but I need you to stand with me in demanding that Republicans hold open hearings.

**[Tell Senate Republicans: No more secret negotiations. Hold an open hearing on health care. Add your name>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2613/7377f838/36733858/51fb60bb/2541513221/VEsF/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-stand-with-joe-and-demand-an-open-hearing-on-health-care")**

Thanks for fighting alongside me.

Joe

P.S. Senate Republican leaders announced this morning that they have set a timeline to vote on their disastrous health care bill _next week_. **[Time is of the essence: Join me in calling for an open hearing on health care.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2613/7377f838/36733858/51fb60bb/2541513221/VEsC/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-stand-with-joe-and-demand-an-open-hearing-on-health-care")** **** **** **** **** | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2613/7377f838/36733858/51fb60ba/2541513221/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20170620db&amount=25")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The resources they need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Our legislators are failing Washington's children, and I am fed up.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTEzMDUwNTIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MTc2MzQ1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Dear Friend, You know it, I know it, and the Washington Supreme Court has demanded it. The legislature must provide our public schools and our kids with the funding they need, and this is the year to get it done. But after a 105-day regular session, a 30-day special session, and another 29 days in our 2nd special session -- there is still no funding deal. Fully funding our schools requires making some tough decisions, but that's exactly what legislators are elected to do. And every day that goes by with no budget agreement is one more day our schools are being short-changed. Last week, I took a two-day tour across Washington to visit schools in King County, Southwest Washington, Spokane, and Walla Walla. I met Washington students who are voracious learners, and parents and teachers who put everything they have into giving students the best opportunities available. But there is something stopping them: The state is not providing the necessary funding to pay for all the basics. I am tired of waiting for our state legislators to get this done. Our kids deserve immediate action. [**Stand with me now and send a strong message to Olympia: It is time to get the job done and fund our schools!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTEzMDUwNTIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MTc2MzQ1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) This past week there were whispers about some legislators being unwilling to make the hard choices necessary to get this done. Our kids deserve better than a bare-bones budget that doesn't fix our school funding challenges. This is the paramount duty of the state. The time has come. Our legislators need to amply fund education NOW. [**Join me in insisting that our legislature commit to funding our schools today!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTEzMDUwNTIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MTc2MzQ1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Our children thank you -- and so do I. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTEzMDUwNTIS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE4MTc2MzQ1MgS2&mt=1&rt=0)

clean_body: Our legislators are failing Washington's children, and I am fed up. | Dear Friend, You know it, I know it, and the Washington Supreme Court has demanded it. The legislature must provide our public schools and our kids with the funding they need, and this is the year to get it done. But after a 105-day regular session, a 30-day special session, and another 29 days in our 2nd special session -- there is still no funding deal. Fully funding our schools requires making some tough decisions, but that's exactly what legislators are elected to do. And every day that goes by with no budget agreement is one more day our schools are being short-changed. Last week, I took a two-day tour across Washington to visit schools in King County, Southwest Washington, Spokane, and Walla Walla. I met Washington students who are voracious learners, and parents and teachers who put everything they have into giving students the best opportunities available. But there is something stopping them: The state is not providing the necessary funding to pay for all the basics. I am tired of waiting for our state legislators to get this done. Our kids deserve immediate action. This past week there were whispers about some legislators being unwilling to make the hard choices necessary to get this done. Our kids deserve better than a bare-bones budget that doesn't fix our school funding challenges. This is the paramount duty of the state. The time has come. Our legislators need to amply fund education NOW. Our children thank you -- and so do I. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee |
